title: King Kong Gun — Part 2
description: Luffy’s last attack breaks Doflamingo and ends the tyrant’s rule over Dressrosa.
scene: On pages 9–13, Luffy, Colosseum Fighters, Trafalgar Law, Doflamingo, Trebol move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: And you say your Haki's come back!? I can't hear you, Lucy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Now that was a massive boom...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Look at the size of that impact cloud...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Uuughh... my body... it's moving... on its own...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Looks like you just barely survived again, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What happened to that Kong gun of yours?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: You're a tenacious little bastard, I'll give you that...how about I just skewer you head to toe?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: That was the problem, Rayleigh! This one...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: This thing was way bigger than the last one! Kong gun didn't do crap!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Hahaha! Sounds like you were in quite the bind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Looks like you've got to come up with an alternative when faced with a similar situation again! Gear 4...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Simply puts too much stress on your body.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: If all you little pests would have just quietly let me control you inside my cage...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: We wouldn't have had to see this much blood spilled today!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I'm sick and tired of your bullshit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: The Royal Plateau's gonna be sliced to bits!

summary: This part focuses on king kong gun, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
